generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws are outdated and can't keep up with modern threats. We need to expand security powers to better protect our communities. Remember, a little more oversight today means a lot more safety tomorrow. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
